category_sources: source_facts.description says magnification filter designed for pixel art; official GitHub README describes hqx as a high-quality magnification filter for pixel art.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hqx; official GitHub repository and README use “hqx”.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains introduction, build, install, usage, example, and implementation sections; no separate official docs site found in supplied facts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/grom358/hqx; repo not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents hq2x/hq3x/hq4x pixel-art scaling, CLI usage, and C library examples; source_facts.executables lists hqx.
